title: gladiolus sabulosus
intro: Gladiolus sabulosus, also known as the sandy gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus sabulosus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. The herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
